content.full_text:
January 28, 2003

Debbie R. Beltram, Chief Deputy Controller
Office of the California State Controller
Post Office Box 942850
Sacramento, CA 94250

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-03-264

Dear Ms. Beltram:

This letter is written notification that we have withdrawn the above-captioned request for advice regarding the provisions of the Political Reform Act.1 As of this date, you have not provided the information we requested in December, which is necessary for completion of our analysis.

If you are able to obtain the requested information in the future, please submit another inquiry.

Should you have any questions, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: John W. Wallace
Assistant General Counsel
Legal Division

JWW:jg
I:\Advice Ltrs\03264

1 Government Code sections 81000-91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997 of the California Code of Regulations.
